description: A graphic styled as a Fox News article card. A blue FOX NEWS banner runs across the top, with a bold headline below, part highlighted in yellow, reading Cocaine worth over $1.1M seized from 'empty' truck at Texas border. Beneath the headline is a photograph of a white SUV driving along a dirt road beside a tall slatted steel border fence under a hazy sky.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; Cocaine worth over $1.1M seized from 'empty' truck at Texas border
